_source: Netflix Tech Blog + VdoCipher Netflix Architecture Analysis (2025)
description: Netflix menggunakan Zuul 2 sebagai edge gateway dengan token-agnostic identity propagation untuk semua API request

traffic.note: Netflix processes ~14 billion API calls per day across all devices

architecture.note: Zuul 2 re-architected on Netty for persistent connections at high scale

latency_context.note: Netflix ELS load balancer assumes 800ms penalty for cross-globe retry round-trip

simulation_use.source_baseline: MDPI peer-reviewed journal — avg 197ms auth latency (P95: 270ms, P99: 320ms)
simulation_use.traffic_pattern: bursty — peaks at content release events
